mapper.select: select lec_id , creator_id , lec_title , description , price , capacity , cur_enrollment_cnt , lec_status , start_date , end_date , created_at , updated_at from lecture where lec_id = #{lecId}

select m.mem_name , date_format(e.confirmed_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') as confirmed_at from enrollment e join member m on e.mem_id = m.mem_id where e.lec_id = #{lecId} and e.enroll_status = 'CONFIRMED' order by e.created_at DESC
